appTitle: Shadow Fleet Stalker - Live Vessel Tracking Dashboard

csv.comment: Change maxVessels to limit data loaded (for performance). Set to 0 for no limit.

map.comment: defaultCenter is [latitude, longitude]. Change to focus on specific region.

apisEndpoints.comment: Free public AIS endpoints - no API keys required
apisEndpoints.note: To add real AIS data: fetch from these endpoints and parse JSON responses

csvColumnMapping.comment: Maps CSV headers to app fields. Modify if your CSV has different column names.

localStorage.comment: Data automatically persists in browser. Clear localStorage to reset cache.

how_to_extend.addRealAISData: Replace generateMockHistory() with actual API calls to MarineTraffic or VesselFinder
how_to_extend.addMoreVessels: Increase 'maxVessels' value or remove the .slice(0, 150) limit in loadVesselsFromCSV()
how_to_extend.customizeTheme: Modify CSS variables in <style> or create new color scheme
how_to_extend.addFilters: Add new select dropdowns and filter in filterAndRenderMarkers() method
how_to_extend.addMoreCharts: Create new Chart instances for other vessel metrics (e.g., cargo, emissions)
